properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Say to those who are fearful hearted Do not be afraid The Lord your God is strong With His Mighty Arms When you call on His name He will come and save you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He will come and save you He will come and save you Say to the weary one Your God will surely come He will come and save you He will come and save you He will come and save you Lift your eyes to Him You will arise again He will come and save you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Say to those who are broken hearted Do not lose your faith The Lord, your God is strong With His loving arms When you call on His name He will surely come

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He is our refuge in the day of trouble He is our shelter in the time of storm He is our tower in the day of sorrow Our fortress in the time of war
